original_image_tags: A small, yellowed newspaper clipping from a larger page, with text about a flying saucer sighting in Venice. A handwritten arrow points from the right margin to the clipping with the annotation "file".

elements.description: One small, rectangular, yellowed newspaper clipping centered on the page. Headline text reads 'VENICE REPORTS FLYING SAUCER'. Body text below reads 'Venice, Monday Morning. - A silver-coloured "flying saucer" was reported above the fishing port of Caigoggi, near here, early today travelling "at great speed" about 6,000ft. up. - Reuter.'

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on a yellowed newspaper clipping about a flying saucer in Venice, but B provides specific quoted headline and body text that A does not mention, and A includes a handwritten arrow annotation that B does not.
